description_long: This is a freestanding banner featuring a prominent, stylized geometric logo in white lines on a purple background, reminiscent of the Twitch logo. The banner itself is a flat, polygonal panel with sharp, clean edges and a smooth surface, mounted vertically atop a solid, cylindrical black base. The front face displays the logo clearly, while the back is plain purple with no markings or text. The supporting structure is a thin, vertical rod that connects the banner to the base, providing stability. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for drawing attention in public or event spaces. The materials appear to be lightweight plastic or acrylic for the banner and rod, with a heavier plastic or composite base for support.
description: A modern, freestanding purple banner with a white geometric logo, mounted on a black cylindrical base with a thin vertical support rod.
description_view_0: Front view showing the purple banner with a white outlined geometric logo, mounted on a black base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the banner and the vertical support rod attached to the black cylindrical base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain purple back of the banner with no visible markings, atop the black base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin profile of the banner and the vertical support rod, similar to view 1.
